name: Bitcoin
rationale: BTC is the only asset that clearly passes my short-term momentum screen: 1W is +1.21% and 1M is +8.9%, even though 3M is still negative at -14.89%, so I treat this as a small starter rather than a full swing hold. Reuters-sourced coverage says bitcoin is rebounding toward $66k as ETF inflows recover, which supports the bid, and the macro backdrop is modestly risk-on because traders expect the Fed
